assetPolicy: WM-0086 ships a deterministic code-only fixture with no remote fetches. Future Web media or data packs must remain same-origin and stay inside the M6 compressed download budget.
authorityBoundary: Simulation Worker or headless remains the only world authority. Web UI, Pixi and React consume read-only fixture and projection data only.
sabFallback: SharedArrayBuffer remains optional. Without cross-origin isolation, the Web gate must stay on Transferable snapshot/projection fallback without moving authority into the UI.

browserTargets.note: Primary Chromium Web product-gate target for WM-0087 performance and loading evidence.
Same-spec Chromium target with explicit later measurement in WM-0087; WM-0086 records assumptions only.

primaryEvidence.label: Reviewed M5 alpha content framework closeout
